---
name: Spec issue
about: A question, contradiction, or [OPEN] resolution in the spec.
title: "[spec] "
labels: spec
---

## Section

Which section of `docs/CLIFFORD_SPEC.md` (or which Decision in
`docs/DECISIONS.md`) is the issue about?

## Issue

(Question / contradiction / proposal.)

## Suggested resolution

Optional. If proposing a fix, sketch the change to the spec text and any
downstream implications.

## Compatibility

Would resolving this be a breaking change relative to v0.1's locked decisions?
